title: Formatting Phone Numbers
scenario: Write a prompt to format phone numbers in a given text from a specific format to a standardized format (555-555-5555). The input text contains phone numbers in various formats, such as 555-1234, 123 4567, or (800) 345-6789. The prompt should handle edge cases and ensure the output is consistent.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the output adheres to the given constraints.
Check if the output is a valid list of formatted phone numbers.
Judge if the output correctly handles edge cases.
